package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostPanicRecoverForControlFlow() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_panic_recover_for_control_flow"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag panic/recover used for expected branch control in performance-sensitive code."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
